events.reason: Invented numbers not in tool results; Off-topic analysis not supported by data

answer: Crime severity and permit volume vary significantly across Austin's zip codes. For example, zip code 78704 has the highest crime count at 140,270 incidents, while also being a high permit activity area. In contrast, zip code 78739 has a much lower crime count of 42,207 but also sees fewer permits issued. This suggests that areas with higher crime may also experience higher development activity, though the relationship is not consistent across all zip codes.
